{{Quote|And if I refuse?|Bho Vendoll to [[Kisquar]], in the process of being coerced|<ref name="Secrets of the Sisar Run">''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''</ref>}}
'''Bho Vendoll''' was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''[[Tragic Flaw]]''. He worked as a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] for the criminal empire [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. He worked directly under [[Kisquar]].
